strategy: Keep a shield on yourself before you attack — hitting him or his allies without a shield up triggers a 350 Death Vampire on the attacker.
He Cleanse Wards a random wizard every other round, stripping shields and traps, so re-shield before you hit.
Hit with Storm (+10%); he resists Myth 40%.
The whole fight is low health — blade and AoE the board quickly.
cheatNotes: Attack him or his minions without a shield on yourself and he Vampires the attacker for 350 — always keep a shield up.
Absorbs won't stop that Vampire, so use an actual shield.
Every other round he strips all shields and traps off a random wizard — reapply your shield before attacking.
